title: Rocksmith
notes: Game runs perfectly. But it does not recognize the Real Tone Cable.

So here's the thing, the game runs perfectly. It's a matter of getting the real tone cable to show up in game. I've tried switching around the sound drivers to no avail. My guess is that if you could add the real tone cable to the list of devices in the winecfg, you might be able to work. I spent some time trying but didn't have any luck.
